comment: Österreichische Druckschrift: 3 strokes in order. 1: bottom-left UP to apex. 2: apex DOWN to bottom-right. 3: crossbar left→right at mid-height.

strokes.comment: Left leg: bottom-left diagonally UP to apex (top-center)
Right leg: apex (top-center) diagonally DOWN to bottom-right
Crossbar: left to right at mid-height
